config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be used to justify abuse, censorship, and unfair treatment of minorities. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, while still limiting them only when there is a clear and necessary public need. From my perspective, the best social order is one that respects people as individuals, not one that treats them as expendable for the collective.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu harus menjadi batas utama, bukan penghalang yang bisa disingkirkan sesuka hati, meskipun saya juga mengakui ada situasi terbatas seperti keselamatan publik atau keadaan darurat. Kalau prioritasnya dibalik terlalu jauh, kelompok minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer biasanya yang paling dulu dirugikan. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi kebebasan pribadi terlebih dahulu, lalu membatasi hanya bila ada kebutuhan yang benar-benar jelas dan sempit.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights. From my perspective in Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to "the public good" can be used to pressure people to stay quiet, conform, or accept unfair treatment, especially when power is uneven. That said, I also do not believe individual rights are absolute in every case, because public health, safety, and social order can justify limited restrictions if they are clear, proportional, and temporary. The real danger is when "society first" becomes a blank check for authorities to ignore personal dignity and minority rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus mengalahkan hak individu secara umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat curiga terhadap argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” karena di sini itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan perluasan kekuasaan, sensor, atau perlakuan tidak adil terhadap kelompok yang tidak populer. Bagi saya, hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, dan pembatasan hanya boleh terjadi kalau benar-benar perlu, sempit, proporsional, dan sementara, seperti untuk keselamatan publik atau keadaan darurat. Kalau tidak, “masyarakat” terlalu mudah menjadi alasan untuk mengorbankan martabat dan kebebasan orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should routinely take priority over the rights of the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of logic is often used to pressure people into silence and conformity. The point about public health, safety, and emergency limits is valid, but those limits must stay narrow, proportional, and temporary, or they quickly become a tool for abuse. When people say “for the sake of society,” I want to know who defines that, who benefits, and whose rights are being sacrificed. A healthy society is not one that treats individuals as disposable; it is one that protects them while balancing real public needs honestly.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman saya sebagai orang Amerika, alasan “demi kepentingan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan perluasan kekuasaan, sensor, dan perlakuan tidak adil terhadap orang yang tidak populer atau minoritas. Pembatasan memang bisa sah untuk keselamatan publik, kesehatan, atau keadaan darurat, tetapi harus benar-benar sempit, proporsional, dan sementara. Kalau tidak, “masyarakat” hanya jadi kata lain untuk membiarkan hak dan martabat individu dikorbankan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
